buildCommand: uv pip install --system mkdocs-material 'mkdocstrings[python]' pymdown-extensions mkdocs-git-revision-date-localized-plugin mkdocs-rss-plugin && cd viz && npm install && npm run build:deploy && cd .. && mkdocs build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self'
